phases.title: Repository Foundation
phases.goal: Monorepo scaffold, docs, agent system, examples, schemas, and base scripts exist.

tasks.title: Create monorepo skeleton
Define product docs and ADRs
Add agent autonomy package
Seed examples and schemas

phases.title: Compiler Core Vertical Slice
phases.goal: Compile one brief + one profile into multi-target outputs with diagnostics and tests.

tasks.title: Implement validation + normalization
Implement target template builders
Implement diagnostics and scoring
Add core tests
Tighten example fixtures

phases.title: VS Code Local UX
phases.goal: Open Prompt Studio, compile in-app, preview outputs, and export a bundle into the workspace.

tasks.title: Open Prompt Studio panel
Wire compile messages to core
Implement export bundle command
Add artifact explorer tree view
Polish UX, copy, errors, and state restore

phases.title: CLI and API Parity
phases.goal: The same compile path works from CLI and API.

tasks.title: Complete CLI argument flow
Implement API compile route
Define error contract
Add smoke tests for parity

phases.title: Hardening and Monetization Seams
phases.goal: Package quality, docs fidelity, and product seams are strong enough for real iteration.

tasks.title: Tighten CI and workspace scripts
Add template packs and preset system
Define billing boundaries and entitlement map
Add release checklist
Prepare extension packaging and marketplace assets

phases.title: Hosted Sync and Account Seams
phases.goal: Introduce reusable hosted account, entitlement, and automation boundaries without compromising the local-first compile path.

tasks.title: Add shared entitlement and session bootstrap contract
Define sync manifest contract for hosted profile libraries
Define automation job envelope and queue states
Add API middleware seam for hosted capability checks

phases.title: Hosted Library Persistence and Sync Touchpoints
phases.goal: Add durable hosted-library seams that can later be backed by real storage and connected to extension sync UX.

tasks.title: Define hosted profile library document contract
Add API read/write routes for hosted profile libraries
Add extension-side hosted sync intent actions
Introduce storage adapter boundary for API persistence

phases.title: Release Automation and Governance Hardening
phases.goal: Automate release publication, enforce branch protections, and replace placeholder tests with concrete suite coverage.

tasks.title: Add GitHub tag-based release workflow
Set branch protection required checks
Replace placeholder CLI and extension tests

phases.title: Refinement Loops, Workflow Recipes, and Durable Storage
phases.goal: Add iterative refinement to the compile path, introduce workflow recipe execution, and replace in-memory persistence with a file-based storage adapter.

tasks.title: Add RefinementHint type and refinePromptBundle to core
Add /compile/refine API route
Add WorkflowRecipe schema and executor in core
Add file-based storage adapter for profile library
Add refinement hint suggestions to Studio panel
Add tests for refinement, recipe executor, and file adapter
Update docs, roadmap, and API spec

phases.title: Full Automation from Initial Prompt
phases.goal: User provides a single natural language prompt and receives a complete compiled bundle automatically ÔÇö no JSON editing required.

tasks.title: Add AutoCompileRequest / AutoCompileResult types
Implement deriveBriefFromPrompt and autoCompile in core
Add POST /compile/auto API route
Add --prompt flag to CLI
Add Auto Compile section to Studio panel
Handle autoCompile message in extension.ts
Add auto-compile tests (17 assertions)
Update roadmap, API spec, work log

phases.title: Auth and Account Boundary Hardening
phases.goal: Add auth middleware seams, identity propagation, and account/workspace authorization checks across hosted routes.

tasks.title: Create auth.ts with AuthContext, AuthConfig, resolveAuthContext
Wire auth middleware into protected API routes
Add auth unit and integration tests
Update API spec and work log

phases.title: Durable Hosted Backend Integration
phases.goal: Replace file-backed adapter with a production storage adapter (still behind the existing store interface) and keep route contracts unchanged.

tasks.title: Add atomic writes to file store (temp-file + rename)
Add store list/enumerate capability
Add SQLite store adapter behind HostedProfileLibraryStore interface
Add store adapter tests

phases.title: Team Workflows and Governance
phases.goal: Shared workspaces, role-based permissions, and collaboration-safe recipe/profile operations.

tasks.title: Define WorkspaceMember and WorkspaceRole types in core
Add workspace membership store interface
Add role-based route guards (owner/editor/viewer)
Add team workspace API routes
Add governance tests

phases.title: Packaging and Release Commercialization
phases.goal: Marketplace-ready extension packaging, release channels, and billing/entitlement enforcement polish.

tasks.title: Harden entitlement enforcement in all compile/export routes
Add billing credit deduction hooks to automation job envelope
Add release channel config (stable/preview) to extension manifest
Validate extension package.json for VS Code marketplace requirements
Update packaging guide and release checklist

phases.title: Provider Execution Bridge
phases.goal: Close the gap from compiled output to actual AI provider submission. Makes Prompt Compiler indispensable rather than just useful.

tasks.title: Define ProviderTarget and ExecutionRequest contracts in core
Add POST /execute API route with dry-run mode
Implement generic HTTP/OpenAI-compatible provider adapter
Add extension Send to Provider command
Store execution results in artifact explorer alongside bundle
Add CLI --execute flag with provider config file
Tests, schema (execution-request.schema.json), API spec update

phases.title: Closed-Loop Feedback Scoring
phases.goal: Record outcome feedback per compiled output and use it to improve future scoring weights per profile. Makes the product a learning creative system.

tasks.title: Add FeedbackRecord type and feedback schema to core
Add POST /feedback API route to persist outcome signals
Implement deriveScoringWeightsFromFeedback in core
Persist feedback per profile in hosted store adapter
Apply learned weights to buildScoreCard via CompileOptions.scoreWeights
Surface aggregate feedback in artifact explorer
Tests for weight derivation and weighted scoring

phases.title: Publishing Automation and Release Pipelines
phases.goal: Push accepted bundles to release destinations (webhooks, CMS, platform APIs) without leaving the tool. Fulfils PRD publishing automation and justifies Studio tier.

tasks.title: Define PublishTarget and PublishJob contracts in core
Add POST /publish/jobs API route
Implement generic signed-webhook publish adapter
Add Publish Bundle extension command with configurable destination
Persist publish job state in hosted store adapter
Add CLI --publish flag reading publish-config.json
Tests, schema (publish-job.schema.json), API spec update

phases.title: Shareable Profile Marketplace
phases.goal: Creators share and sell branded profiles and template packs. Monetization wedge that requires no server-side execution ÔÇö pure schema-validated JSON artifacts behind an entitlement gate.

tasks.title: Define MarketplaceListingDocument contract and schema
Add GET /marketplace/listings and POST /marketplace/listings routes
Add entitlement gate: pro.creator to publish, free to browse
Add POST /marketplace/install route to pull listing into profile library
Add Browse Marketplace extension command (quick pick)
Add CLI --install-listing <id> flag
Tests, schema (marketplace-listing.schema.json), API spec update

phases.title: Surface Parity, Feedback Loop Completion, and Hardening
phases.goal: Close extension/CLI parity gaps for provider, publishing, and marketplace flows; finish feedback learning loop UX; and harden end-to-end release candidate paths.

tasks.title: Apply learned score weights in live compile scoring path (reopens P15-5)
Add extension Send to Provider command and persist execution artifacts (reopens P14-4/P14-5)
Add CLI execute flow and provider config support (reopens P14-6)
Surface aggregate feedback in artifact explorer (reopens P15-6)
Add extension Publish Bundle command (reopens P16-4)
Add CLI publish flow and publish-config support (reopens P16-6)
Add extension Browse Marketplace command (reopens P17-5)
Add CLI install-listing flow (reopens P17-6)
Add cross-surface smoke + failure-path hardening tests for execute/feedback/publish/marketplace journeys

phases.title: Release Candidate and Packaging
phases.goal: Produce a repeatable release-candidate workflow with validated packaging, release notes, and stable-cut readiness.

tasks.title: Run release checklist and packaging verification for current build
Prepare release notes focused on newly delivered provider/publish/marketplace flows
Create preview release candidate artifact and validate install smoke path
Finalize stable-release handoff checklist with reproducible commands

phases.title: API Input Validation Hardening
phases.goal: Wire the existing JSON schemas in packages/schemas into runtime ajv validators. Enforce schema-level validation at critical API route boundaries. Add rejection-path test coverage.

tasks.title: Upgrade packages/schemas to export ajv 2020-12 compiled validators
Normalize draft-07 schemas to 2020-12 with $defs
Wire validateBrief and validateProfile into POST /compile
Wire validateExecutionRequest into POST /execute
Wire validateFeedbackInput into POST /feedback
Add ajv-formats for date-time and uri format validation
Add inputValidation.test.ts with 34 unit + integration rejection tests

phases.goal: Add bundle lifecycle state, reviewer collaboration, and publish approval gates.

tasks.title: Add BundleReviewRecord contracts
Implement review lifecycle helpers
Add API review routes

phases.title: Review, Approval, and Team Workflow Layer

phases.goal: Add durable metering and entitlement-aware UX.

tasks.title: Define usage metering contracts
Persist usage events
Add entitlement-aware UX

phases.title: Commercial Readiness Layer

phases.goal: Surface feature gates with clear upgrade paths.

tasks.title: Add entitlement error messages
Wire hints in extension
Add CLI messaging

phases.title: Entitlement-Aware UX Hints

phases.goal: Real HTTP integrations for OpenAI, Suno, Udio, FLUX, Kling with end-to-end tests.

tasks.title: OpenAI-compatible and type system
Suno/Udio adapters
FLUX/Kling adapters
End-to-end integration tests

phases.title: Live Provider Adapters

phases.goal: Add deterministic retry/timeout controls to live execution so provider calls are resilient without duplicating logic across API, CLI, and extension.

tasks.title: Add execution policy contract in core
Wire policy through API route and schema
Add retry/timeout execution tests
Add retry classification for provider HTTP status codes
Expose execution policy in CLI and extension UX

phases.title: Execution Reliability Controls

phases.goal: Make usage metering durable and enforce credits/tier limits for hosted operations.

tasks.title: Add SQLite-backed usage ledger store
Wire usage ledger store selection in API bootstrap
Add SQLite usage ledger persistence tests
Add route-level credit/quota enforcement for execute/publish/install
Expose usage limits and remaining credits in session/bootstrap

phases.title: Durable Metering & Credit Enforcement

phases.goal: Add Stripe-ready checkout, portal, and webhook seams that can persist account plan state and feed hosted bootstrap contracts.

tasks.title: Add billing account store seam
Add Stripe checkout route scaffold
Add Stripe webhook and portal routes
Overlay persisted billing state in session bootstrap
Add durable billing account persistence

phases.title: Stripe Billing Integration

phases.goal: Deliver streamed execution with realtime progress events so clients can show live operation state while keeping metering and entitlement behavior consistent.

tasks.title: Add SSE execute stream API route
Add extension live progress surface
Add CLI stream execution mode
Unify provider progress telemetry model
Add streaming smoke and failure-path tests

phases.title: Streaming Execution and Realtime Progress

phases.goal: Complete cross-surface streaming parity (P28 closure), close all production blockers, and cut the first fully production-capable milestone release (M1).
phases.title: Production Hardening & M1 Release Gate

tasks.title: Add extension live progress webview for POST /execute/stream
tasks.note: Real-time status badge, event log with provider timing, abort control. Closes P28-2.

tasks.title: Add CLI --stream flag with SSE event parsing
tasks.note: Human-readable stderr progress, clean JSON stdout result. Closes P28-3.

tasks.title: Unify provider progress telemetry event shape
tasks.note: Standardize started/progress/completed fields and token-usage across all 5 provider adapters. Closes P28-4.

tasks.title: Add cross-surface streaming smoke and failure-path tests
tasks.note: dry-run, live-mock, timeout/abort, auth-error. Closes P28-5.

tasks.title: Stripe webhook idempotency and payload validation hardening
tasks.note: Dedup by idempotency key, explicit schema validation, 8+ tests covering bad sig/duplicate/state transitions.

tasks.title: Add quota pre-guards on execute/publish/install before dispatch
tasks.note: Enforce limits before calling provider; add 402/429 rejection tests.

tasks.title: Add .env.example and deployment secrets documentation
tasks.note: Document STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET and all required env vars.

tasks.title: Add SQLite PRAGMA user_version schema versioning to all three DDLs
tasks.note: Validate on startup; document migration process for schema changes.

tasks.title: M1 release gate: package, smoke, checklist sign-off
tasks.note: npm run test green; VSIX installs; Stripe safety tests pass; .env.example committed.

phases.goal: Replace in-memory feedback with durable SQLite persistence, add a learning audit trail, and surface learning metadata in bootstrap and extension UI. Foundation for all autonomous learning.
phases.title: Durable Feedback Foundation & Learning Observability (M2)

tasks.title: Add createSqliteFeedbackStore() with FEEDBACK_STORE_TYPE env flag
tasks.note: feedback_records table; indexed on (profileId, createdAt) and (bundleId, createdAt); keep in-memory for local/test mode.

tasks.title: Add weight_derivations audit table and append on every deriveScoringWeightsFromFeedback call
tasks.note: Columns: derivedAt, inputRecordCount, priorWeights JSON, newWeights JSON, weightChanges per dimension, trigger enum.

tasks.title: Extend /session/bootstrap with learning block
tasks.note: feedbackCount per profile, lastDerivedAt, currentWeights, pendingCandidates count, divergenceAlert flag.

tasks.title: Add learning metering domain and per-plan quota
tasks.note: domain: 'learning', action: 'shadow-evaluation'; free: 20/month, pro: 200, studio: unlimited.

tasks.title: Add weight derivation timeline view in extension artifact explorer
tasks.note: Show when weights last changed, delta per dimension, input record count.

tasks.title: Add tests: SQLite feedback persistence, audit trail, bootstrap learning payload, learning quota
M2 gate: feedback outlasts restart; audit row per derivation; bootstrap returns learning block; quota in snapshot

phases.goal: Add bounded weight derivation, divergence detection, weight versioning lifecycle, shadow evaluation pipeline, and operator-facing approve/discard/rollback controls. All learning from this point is gated and reversible.
phases.title: Bounded Learning Adaptation & Safe Gates (M3)

tasks.title: Add LearnOpts type and update deriveScoringWeightsFromFeedback signature
tasks.note: maxWeightDelta, minSampleSize, decayFactor, cooldownMs, enableLearning. Defaults: delta=0.05, sample=5, cooldown=24h.

tasks.title: Implement per-dimension delta clamping and cooldown guard
tasks.note: Skip derivation if within cooldownMs of prior; apply recency weighting (< 7d=1.0, 7-30d=0.7, >30d=0.3).

tasks.title: Add divergence detection over last 10 derivations
tasks.note: CV > 0.15 per dimension triggers learningDivergenceDetected audit event and sets divergenceAlert in bootstrap.

tasks.title: Add weight versioning lifecycle to HostedProfileLibraryDocument and weight_versions table
tasks.note: columns: version, weights, derivedFrom hash, createdAt, status (candidate|active|rolled_back); activeWeightVersion pointer.

tasks.title: Add shadow evaluation pipeline: POST /admin/learning/shadow-evaluate
tasks.note: Compile reference briefs with candidate vs baseline; compare avg scorecards; promotion criteria: no regression > -2%, min 5 evals, no divergence alert.

tasks.title: Add extension commands: approveLearningCandidate, discardLearningCandidate, rollbackWeights
tasks.note: Operator UX: promote, discard, rollback with audit; weight history panel in Studio webview.

tasks.title: Add tests: delta clamp, cooldown, divergence detection, shadow eval scoring, promote/discard/rollback lifecycle, cost deduction
M3 gate: rollback drill verified; divergence alert fires on oscillation; shadow eval metering in ledger

phases.goal: Add configurable LearningMode per profile, scheduled batch recompute, responsive auto-proposal, and operator dashboard. Autonomous mode activates only after safety gates are consistently stable.
phases.title: Autonomous Learning Modes (M4)

tasks.title: Add LearningMode enum to HostedProfileLibraryDocument
tasks.note: Values: manual, manual-review, scheduled, responsive, autonomous. Default: manual. Owner/admin can change; viewer read-only.

tasks.title: Add POST /admin/learning/batch-recompute route (admin scope)
tasks.note: Iterates profiles with mode != manual; applies bounded derivation; stores candidate; returns per-profile summary.

tasks.title: Add responsive candidate creation on POST /feedback
tasks.note: For profiles with mode=responsive or autonomous: trigger async bounded derivation after cooldown + sample-size checks pass; emit learning.candidateCreated event.

tasks.title: Add autonomous auto-promotion after shadow eval gates pass
tasks.note: For mode=autonomous: schedule shadow eval; if all criteria pass within 72h, auto-promote; suspend if divergenceAlert is true.

tasks.title: Add operator dashboard data endpoint and extension webview panel
tasks.note: Pending candidates, recent promotions, divergence alerts, learning budget; bulk approve/suspend actions.

tasks.title: Implement autonomous mode unlock criteria check
tasks.note: Only unlock mode=autonomous if: M3 gate passed, 2 consecutive stable promotion cycles, no post-promotion regression.

tasks.title: Add tests: mode persistence, batch recompute, responsive candidate, auto-promotion happy path, divergence suspension, dashboard data
M4 gate: all modes produce correct candidates; autonomous auto-promotes on green gates; suspends on divergence; batch of 5 profiles within budget

phases.goal: Validate the autonomous learning system against real beta interaction data, tune thresholds, run security and privacy audit on learning endpoints, complete rollback drill, and cut the GA release.
phases.title: Beta Tuning & GA Readiness (M5)

tasks.title: Enable responsive mode for private beta cohort and collect feedback signals
tasks.note: 14-day collection window; measure acceptance uplift vs baseline; log all auto-promotion events.

tasks.title: Tune learning thresholds from beta data
tasks.note: Adjust maxWeightDelta default, CV divergence threshold, and promotion criteria based on false-positive rate and acceptance impact.

tasks.title: Add POST /admin/learning/impact-report and impact regression test suite
tasks.note: Compare acceptance rate before/after each autonomous promotion; flag negative-impact promotions automatically.

tasks.title: Security and privacy audit of all learning endpoints
tasks.note: Confirm /admin/learning/* requires admin scope; no PII in audit logs beyond accountId; RBAC test: viewer cannot trigger learning ops.

tasks.title: Rollback drill: end-to-end autonomous promotion -> rollback -> re-promote; document in docs/15_MANUAL_SMOKE_CHECK.md
M5 GA gate: complete docs/17_RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md; update CHANGELOG; tag v1.0.0; verify GitHub Release auto-created with VSIX
tasks.note: Go/no-go: beta no regression, zero divergence in production during beta, security audit green, rollback drill documented.
